swahili.the_earliest_known_brick_wall_dates_to: Ukuta wa tofali wa zamani zaidi unaojulikana ni wa ~7500 KK huko Yeriko!
swahili.the_leaning_tower_of_pisa_has_a_3_97_l: Mnara wa Pisa ulioegemea una mwinamo wa 3.97° kutokana na misingi mifupi!
swahili.the_parthenon_used_marble_limestone_an: Parthenon ilitumia marmar, chokaa na vibano vya chuma!
swahili.the_taj_mahal_is_perfectly_symmetrical: Taj Mahal ni ya ulinganifu kamili kando ya mhimili wake wa kati.
swahili.the_1915_anakkale_bridge_spans_2_023_m: Daraja la Çanakkale la 1915 lina urefu wa mita 2,023!
swahili.igloos_use_dome_shapes_to_minimize_hea: Iglu hutumia maumbo ya kuba kupunguza upotevu wa joto!
swahili.the_burj_khalifa_828m_uses_a_y_shaped_: Burj Khalifa (m828) hutumia mpangilio wa sakafu wenye umbo la Y!
swahili.the_great_pyramid_contains_2_3_million: Piramidi Kuu ina vizuizi vya mawe milioni 2.3!
swahili.architects_balance_light_ventilation_i: Wasanifu majengo husawazisha mwanga, hewa, uadilifu na urembo!
swahili.place_your_very_first_block: Weka kizuizi chako cha kwanza kabisa
swahili.have_100_blocks_in_one_build: Kuwa na vizuizi 100+ katika ujenzi mmoja
swahili.use_all_12_shape_types_in_one_build: Tumia aina zote 12 za maumbo katika ujenzi mmoja
swahili.use_all_6_materials_in_one_build: Tumia vifaa vyote 6 katika ujenzi mmoja
swahili.architecture_studio_keyboard_shortcuts: Studio ya Usanifu Majengo. Njia za mkato za kibodi: P Weka, E Futa, A Paka rangi, R Zungusha.
swahili.paste_share_code_to_import_a_design: Bandika msimbo wa kushiriki ili kuingiza muundo
swahili.interactive_architecture_studio_3d_vis: Taswira ya 3D shirikishi ya studio ya usanifu majengo
swahili.low_effective_stress_structure_tolerat: Mkazo bora wa chini. Muundo huvumilia hali kali.
swahili.within_design_margins_survives_normal_: Ndani ya kikomo cha muundo. Hunusurika mizigo ya kawaida.
swahili.approaching_failure_threshold_marginal: Inakaribia kikomo cha kushindwa. Mpakani chini ya mkazo.
swahili.hypothesis_when_does_rigidity_rescue_a: Dhana: Ugumu huokoa lini muundo uliopakiwa kupita kiasi?
swahili.explain_how_gravity_rigidity_and_mass_: Eleza jinsi mvuto, ugumu na uzito vinavyoingiliana kuamua uthabiti.

hausa.the_earliest_known_brick_wall_dates_to: Bangon tubali mafi tsufa da aka sani ya kasance ~7500 KZ a Yariko!
hausa.the_leaning_tower_of_pisa_has_a_3_97_l: Hasumiyar Pisa mai karkata tana da karkata na 3.97° saboda harsashin da bai yi zurfi ba!
hausa.use_3_different_materials: Yi amfani da kayan aiki 3+ daban-daban
hausa.the_parthenon_used_marble_limestone_an: Parthenon ya yi amfani da marmara, farar dutse, da ƙwanƙolin ƙarfe!
hausa.the_colosseum_has_80_arched_entrances: Colosseum yana da ƙofofin shiga masu bakan 80!
hausa.the_taj_mahal_is_perfectly_symmetrical: Taj Mahal yana da cikakken daidaito tare da tsakiyar gindinsa.
hausa.4_wide_3_high_no_floaters: 4+ fadi, 3+ tsayi, babu abubuwan da ke shawagi
hausa.the_1915_anakkale_bridge_spans_2_023_m: Gadar Çanakkale ta 1915 tana da tsawon mita 2,023!
hausa.igloos_use_dome_shapes_to_minimize_hea: Igloo suna amfani da siffofin kubba don rage asarar zafi!
hausa.the_burj_khalifa_828m_uses_a_y_shaped_: Burj Khalifa (828m) yana amfani da tsarin bene mai siffar Y!
hausa.the_great_pyramid_contains_2_3_million: Babbar Dala tana ƙunshe da tubalan dutse miliyan 2.3!
hausa.30_blocks_4_mats_doors_windows: Tubali 30+, kayan aiki 4+, ƙofofi da tagogi
hausa.architects_balance_light_ventilation_i: Masu zane-zanen gini suna daidaita haske, iska, mutunci, da kyau!
hausa.have_100_blocks_in_one_build: Ka kasance da tubali 100+ a gini guda
hausa.use_all_12_shape_types_in_one_build: Yi amfani da dukkan nau'ikan siffofi 12 a gini guda
hausa.use_all_6_materials_in_one_build: Yi amfani da dukkan kayan aiki 6 a gini guda
hausa.survive_intensity_10_earthquake: Tsira daga girgizar ƙasa mai ƙarfi 10
hausa.build_stable_70_with_exactly_5_blocks: Gina mai ƙarfi (70%+) tare da tubali 5 daidai
hausa.architecture_studio_keyboard_shortcuts: Studio na Gine-gine. Gajerun hanyoyin madannai: P Sanya, E Share, A Yi fenti, R Juya.
hausa.apply_gravity_drop_floating_blocks: Yi amfani da nauyi (jefa tubalan da ke shawagi)
hausa.paste_share_code_to_import_a_design: Manna lambar rabawa don shigo da ƙira
hausa.interactive_architecture_studio_3d_vis: Hangen 3D mai hulɗa na studio na gine-gine
hausa.low_effective_stress_structure_tolerat: Ƙaramin matsi mai inganci. Tsarin yana jure yanayi mai tsanani.
hausa.within_design_margins_survives_normal_: A cikin iyakokin ƙira. Yana tsira daga nauyin yau da kullun.
hausa.approaching_failure_threshold_marginal: Yana kusantar iyakar gazawa. Mai iyaka ƙarƙashin matsi.
hausa.hypothesis_when_does_rigidity_rescue_a: Hasashe: Yaushe taurin ke ceto tsarin da aka ɗora masa nauyi fiye da kima?
hausa.explain_how_gravity_rigidity_and_mass_: Bayyana yadda nauyi, tauri, da girma ke hulɗa don tantance ƙarko.

igbo.the_earliest_known_brick_wall_dates_to: Mgbidi brik kachasị ochie a maara malitere na ~7500 TOA na Jeriko!
igbo.the_leaning_tower_of_pisa_has_a_3_97_l: Ụlọ elu Pisa dabere nwere nhịgharị 3.97° n'ihi ntọala na-emighị emi!
igbo.the_parthenon_used_marble_limestone_an: Parthenon ji marble, nkume limestone, na ihe mkpọchi igwe!
igbo.the_colosseum_has_80_arched_entrances: Colosseum nwere ọnụ ụzọ mbata 80 nwere arch!
igbo.the_taj_mahal_is_perfectly_symmetrical: Taj Mahal nwere nha anya zuru oke n'akụkụ etiti ya.
igbo.4_wide_3_high_no_floaters: 4+ obosara, 3+ ogologo, enweghị ihe na-ese n'elu
igbo.igloos_use_dome_shapes_to_minimize_hea: Igloo na-eji ọdịdị dome belata mfu okpomọkụ!
igbo.the_burj_khalifa_828m_uses_a_y_shaped_: Burj Khalifa (828m) na-eji atụmatụ ala nwere ọdịdị Y!
igbo.the_great_pyramid_contains_2_3_million: Nnukwu Piramid nwere ngọngọ nkume nde 2.3!
igbo.30_blocks_4_mats_doors_windows: Ngọngọ 30+, ihe 4+, ọnụ ụzọ na windo
igbo.architects_balance_light_ventilation_i: Ndị na-ese ụlọ na-eme ka ìhè, ikuku, izuoke, na ịma mma dị n'otu!
igbo.tall_narrow_structure: Ihe owuwu dị ogologo, dị warara
igbo.simple_house_with_roof: Ụlọ dị mfe nwere elu ụlọ
igbo.use_all_12_shape_types_in_one_build: Jiri ụdị ọdịdị 12 niile n'otu owuwu
igbo.survive_intensity_10_earthquake: Lanarị ala ọma jijiji nwere ike 10
igbo.build_stable_70_with_exactly_5_blocks: Wuo nke kwụsiri ike (70%+) jiri ngọngọ 5 kpọmkwem
igbo.architecture_studio_keyboard_shortcuts: Studio Nrụpụta Ụlọ. Ụzọ mkpirisi keyboard: P Tinye, E Hichapụ, A Tee agba, R Tụgharịa.
igbo.apply_gravity_drop_floating_blocks: Tinye ike ndọda (tụda ngọngọ na-ese n'elu)
igbo.paste_share_code_to_import_a_design: Mado koodu nkesa iji bubata atụmatụ
igbo.interactive_architecture_studio_3d_vis: Ngosipụta 3D na-emekọrịta nke studio nrụpụta ụlọ
igbo.low_effective_stress_structure_tolerat: Nrụgide dị mma dị ala. Owuwu na-anagide ọnọdụ ọjọọ.
igbo.within_design_margins_survives_normal_: N'ime oke atụmatụ. Na-anagide ibu nkịtị.
igbo.approaching_failure_threshold_marginal: Na-eru nso na oke ọdịda. Na mpụta n'okpuru nrụgide.
igbo.likely_collapse_under_load: O nwere ike ịda n'okpuru ibu.
igbo.hypothesis_when_does_rigidity_rescue_a: Echiche: Kedu mgbe isi ike na-azọpụta owuwu nwere ibu karịrị akarị?
igbo.explain_how_gravity_rigidity_and_mass_: Kọwaa otú ike ndọda, isi ike, na oke ibu si emekọrịta iji chọpụta nkwụsi ike.

yoruba.the_earliest_known_brick_wall_dates_to: Ògiri bíríkì àtijọ́ jùlọ tí a mọ̀ wà ní ~7500 ṢMK ní Jẹ́ríkò!
yoruba.the_leaning_tower_of_pisa_has_a_3_97_l: Ilé Gogoro Pisa tó tẹ̀ ní ìtẹ̀ 3.97° nítorí ìpìlẹ̀ tí kò jìn!
yoruba.the_parthenon_used_marble_limestone_an: Parthenon lo mábù, òkúta ẹfun, àti àwọn ìdìmú irin!
yoruba.the_taj_mahal_is_perfectly_symmetrical: Taj Mahal jẹ́ déédéé pípé ní àyíká ipò àárín rẹ̀.
yoruba.4_wide_3_high_no_floaters: 4+ fífẹ̀, 3+ gíga, kò sí àwọn èròjà tó ń léfòó
yoruba.igloos_use_dome_shapes_to_minimize_hea: Àwọn igloo lo àwọn ìrísí dome láti dín ìpàdánù ooru kù!
yoruba.the_burj_khalifa_828m_uses_a_y_shaped_: Burj Khalifa (828m) lo àpẹrẹ ilẹ̀ tó ní ìrísí Y!
yoruba.the_great_pyramid_contains_2_3_million: Pyramid Ńlá ní àwọn bulọọku òkúta mílíọ̀nù 2.3!
yoruba.30_blocks_4_mats_doors_windows: Bulọọku 30+, ohun èlò 4+, ìlẹ̀kùn àti fèrèsé
yoruba.architects_balance_light_ventilation_i: Àwọn ayàwòrán ilé ṣe ìwọ̀ntúnwọ̀nsì ìmọ́lẹ̀, afẹ́fẹ́, ìdúróṣinṣin, àti ẹwà!
yoruba.use_all_12_shape_types_in_one_build: Lo gbogbo oríṣi ìrísí 12 nínú ìkọ́lé kan
yoruba.use_all_6_materials_in_one_build: Lo gbogbo ohun èlò 6 nínú ìkọ́lé kan
yoruba.survive_intensity_10_earthquake: Yè nínú ìmìtìtì ilẹ̀ tó lágbára 10
yoruba.build_stable_70_with_exactly_5_blocks: Kọ́ tó dúró ṣinṣin (70%+) pẹ̀lú bulọọku 5 gan-an
yoruba.architecture_studio_keyboard_shortcuts: Studio Iṣẹ́-ọnà Ilé. Àwọn ọ̀nà kúkúrú kọ́ọ̀dù: P Gbé sí, E Pa rẹ́, A Kun, R Yí.
yoruba.apply_gravity_drop_floating_blocks: Lo agbára ìfàmọ́ra (ju àwọn bulọọku tó ń léfòó sílẹ̀)
yoruba.paste_share_code_to_import_a_design: Lẹ̀ kọ́ọ̀dù pínpín láti mú àpẹrẹ wọlé
yoruba.interactive_architecture_studio_3d_vis: Ìfihàn 3D ìbáṣepọ̀ ti studio iṣẹ́-ọnà ilé
yoruba.low_effective_stress_structure_tolerat: Ìfúnpá tó múná dóko kéré. Ètò fara da àwọn ipò líle.
yoruba.within_design_margins_survives_normal_: Nínú àwọn ààlà àpẹrẹ. Ó yè nínú àwọn ẹrù déédéé.
yoruba.approaching_failure_threshold_marginal: Ń sún mọ́ ààlà ìkùnà. Lẹ́gbẹ̀ẹ́ lábẹ́ ìfúnpá.
yoruba.likely_collapse_under_load: Ó ṣeé ṣe kó wó lulẹ̀ lábẹ́ ẹrù.
yoruba.hypothesis_when_does_rigidity_rescue_a: Àròjinlẹ̀: Ìgbà wo ni líle ń gba ètò tó ní ẹrù púpọ̀ jù là?
yoruba.explain_how_gravity_rigidity_and_mass_: Ṣàlàyé bí agbára ìfàmọ́ra, líle, àti ìwọ̀n ṣe ń bára wọn ṣiṣẹ́ láti pinnu ìdúróṣinṣin.
